title: asperula aristata subsp. calabra
intro: Asperula aristata subsp. calabra is a subspecies of the Asperula aristata plant, which belongs to the Rubiaceae family and is commonly known as the 'Calabrian Woodruff'. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Asperula aristata subsp. calabra include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
